artifacts.name: murmur-driver-anthropic
artifacts.description: Anthropic Messages API inference driver for Murmur agent capsules.

artifacts.name: murmur-driver-deepseek
artifacts.description: DeepSeek inference driver — deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro with thinking mode

artifacts.name: murmur-driver-openai
artifacts.description: OpenAI inference driver for Murmur agent capsules — Chat Completions, with Responses API for gpt-5 and later models.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-compact
artifacts.description: Summarises conversation history when the session token threshold is reached.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-debug
artifacts.description: Writes hook lifecycle events to hook-debug.jsonl in the capsule workdir.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-diff-summary
artifacts.description: Snapshots files before each editor tool call and emits a structured unified-diff summary as an artifact event at end of turn.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-eval
artifacts.description: Structured evaluation hook — scores capsule sessions against configured scorers and writes eval.jsonl.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-grafana
artifacts.description: Emits OTel spans to a Grafana Tempo OTLP/HTTP endpoint for each capsule lifecycle event.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-memory-jsonl
artifacts.description: Durable per-Turn Memory Log — appends each Turn to a JSONL file in the capsule workdir, reloads prior Turns at task start, and writes a close-out marker at task end.

artifacts.name: murmur-hook-shell-desc
artifacts.description: Returns enriched tool manifests for common shell binaries at staging time.

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-create
artifacts.description: Scaffolds a new tool artifact directory with murmur.yaml, stub implementation, and README.md.

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-editor
artifacts.description: Structured file editing interface for Murmur capsules.

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-code-coverage
artifacts.description: Spectrum-based fault localization (Ochiai / Tarantula) over a Rust repository

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-code-graph
artifacts.description: Indexes a Rust repository into a SQLite-backed symbol/edge graph and answers

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-git
artifacts.description: Structured git interface for Murmur capsules.

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-test-report
artifacts.description: Parses a raw test-runner output file (already captured on disk by the agent's

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-request-input
artifacts.description: Pauses the agent loop and requests external input via A2A.

artifacts.name: murmur-tool-registry-search
artifacts.description: Search the Murmur artifact registry for artifacts matching a keyword.

artifacts.name: murmur-skill-create-manifest
artifacts.description: Skill artifact: complete knowledge for generating valid murmur manifest files

artifacts.name: murmur-skill-investigation-checkpoint
artifacts.description: Skill artifact: the investigations convention for checkpoints/decisions.json — record and reuse investigative verdicts (ruled-out/confirmed/uncertain) across a session
